app.logs.title: Logs
active_processes.kill_modal_message: Are you sure you want to kill {{name}} (PID: {{pid}})?
active_processes.note_message: Some payloads that inject threads into system processes (like <1>SceShellCore</1>) will persist inside those processes even after their main process is killed.
autoload.move_usb_desc: Required for payloads you want to use in the Autoload sequence.
autoload.enable_desc: Chain multiple payloads to be executed automatically every time Payload Manager starts.
autoload.delay_modal.title: Configure Delay
donate.description: If you'd like to support my work or just say thanks, you can buy me a coffee. It's much appreciated!
manage_sources.add_request_failed: Request failed. Check the URL and try again.
manage_sources.ps5_description: Open this address on your phone or PC to manage payload sources.
manage_sources.add_new_desc: Paste the URL to a JSON file.
move_usb.description: Import the selected payload from your USB drive to the PS5's internal data storage.
move_usb.same_exists_desc: A payload with the same name and content (SHA256: {{sha}}...) is already in your internal library. No action is needed.
move_usb.prev_version_desc: A version of <1>{{name}}</1> already exists in internal storage. Importing this will replace the current installation. Do you want to proceed?
move_usb.ready_desc: The payload will be imported to internal storage. You can either copy it and keep the original on the USB, or move it and delete the original.
move_usb.success_desc: The payload has been safely imported to internal storage.
settings.title: Settings
settings.language_desc: Change the display language of the application.
settings.language_disclaimer: Translations are community-driven and may contain errors.
settings.auto_open_desc: Automatically launch the browser when Payload Manager payload is executed.
settings.auto_install_desc: Automatically install the Payload Manager app to the PS5 home screen.
settings.kill_disc_desc: Automatically terminate the Disc Player application on startup (for BD-JB users).
settings.scan_usb_desc: Enable scanning for .elf and .bin files in the root directory of USB drives (/mnt/usb0-7).
settings.autoload_delay_desc: Wait time before the autoload sequence begins.
settings.multi_sources_desc: Enable third-party payload repositories. Payloads from multiple sources are grouped by catalog in the Manage tab.
settings.manage_sources_desc: Add, remove, or reorder your payload repositories.
settings.log_viewer_desc: Access real-time debug output from the Payload Manager daemon.
storage_hub.search_placeholder: Search payloads by name or description...
storage_hub.repo_unavailable_desc: Check your internet connection and try again.
storage_hub.usb_scan_disabled_1: Extended USB scanning is currently disabled.
storage_hub.usb_scan_disabled_2: Enable "Scan USB Payloads" in settings to search for payloads on connected drives.
storage_hub.remote_management_desc: Access this dashboard from your computer or phone to manage and upload payloads directly from your local network.
